description.value: Aura moderate divination; CL 5th; Slot neck; Price 3,100 gp; Weight 2 lbs. DESCRIPTION This heavy necklace is usually made of gold and looks like a large winged eye. This item is associated with a specific god. You gain a +5 competence bonus on one type of Knowledge checks (each pendant has a different specialty). If you are a worshiper of the associated god, the pendant also counts as a holy symbol. In addition, once per day as a free action, you may add a +10 insight bonus on a single skill check you are about to roll. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Craft Wondrous Item, moment of prescience, creator must have 5 ranks in appropriate Knowledge skill; Cost 1,550 gp
